overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic convertible driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, executes a right turn at a large intersection, and drives through canyon-like streets lined with holographic billboards and towering glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide multi-lane avenue with holographic advertising and elevated transit structures

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic bronze convertible down a wide neon-lit avenue, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: towering futuristic building with illuminated windows rising on the left side of the avenue
massive digital advertisement displaying animated content on the right building facade
raised roadway or monorail track running parallel to the street on the right
yellow and black striped concrete dividers separating the lanes on the left
tall palm trees lining the right side of the avenue against the building backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, multi-lane avenue in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera follows a bronze convertible driving steadily between towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by neon lights and massive holographic billboards. Yellow traffic barriers line the left side while palm trees and elevated transit structures are visible on the right, with moderate traffic flowing ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow grid markings and central monument

events.description: vehicle begins executing a sharp right turn at the large intersection
completing the turn and entering a narrower street with canyon-like building walls

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp right turn at a large intersection, steering the convertible onto a new street while avoiding cross traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan passing through the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: broad intersection marked with yellow crisscross grid lines indicating a no-stop zone
overhead traffic light structure spanning the width of the intersection
large sculptural monument visible on the right corner of the intersection
modern glass facade building with interior lighting visible on the left side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a sharp right turn at a large, open intersection marked with distinctive yellow grid lines. A white sedan passes through from the left as the convertible navigates the corner, passing a prominent monument statue on the right. The scene transitions from the wide avenue to a narrower street as the turn completes, with the palm trees now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with dense overhead neon signage and digital advertisements

events.description: passing under a bright overhead light structure creating a lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the neon canyon street, weaving slightly between lanes while following the flow of traffic

entered.detail: massive suspended digital screen displaying animated advertisements above the street
dense collection of glowing neon signs and holographic displays covering the building facades
tall building facade forming a canyon wall on the left with illuminated windows and signage
tall building facade forming a canyon wall on the right with commercial signage and lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow urban canyon formed by towering buildings on both sides, the street is bathed in colorful neon light from dense clusters of digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The overhead sky is mostly blocked by the high-rise structures, creating an enclosed, immersive atmosphere. The vehicle accelerates through this corridor, passing under a bright overhead light structure that creates a dramatic lens flare.

scene_state.functional_zone: traffic queue in the urban canyon with stopped vehicles ahead

events.description: vehicle rapidly decelerates as traffic ahead comes to a complete stop
waiting behind a red convertible stopped at the traffic queue with brake lights illuminated

agents.ego_description: braking sharply to avoid collision with stopped traffic ahead, coming to a complete stop behind a red vehicle

notable_agents.action: red convertible stopped directly ahead with bright brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: line of stopped vehicles extending down the street ahead with taillights glowing

segments.scene_description: The vehicle rapidly decelerates as it approaches a traffic jam in the narrow street, coming to a complete stop behind a red convertible with illuminated brake lights. The surrounding environment remains the neon-lit urban canyon, but the focus shifts to the dense queue of stopped vehicles ahead. The camera stabilizes as the car waits in the traffic line, surrounded by glowing building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk area with open sky visible ahead and overhead structures

events.description: traffic begins moving and vehicle accelerates sharply from the complete stop
passing through a marked pedestrian crosswalk at increased speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating aggressively as traffic clears, speeding through an intersection with crosswalk markings and overtaking other vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving parallel on the right side through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines covering the road surface
break in the buildings revealing the night sky and distant illuminated skyline structures
pedestrian bridge or connecting structure spanning between buildings ahead

segments.scene_description: As the traffic jam clears, the vehicle accelerates sharply through an intersection marked with pedestrian crosswalk lines. The street opens up slightly, revealing more of the night sky ahead and distant illuminated skyscrapers. A blue sports car appears on the right, driving parallel as the convertible speeds through the urban environment, passing under an overhead walkway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit metropolis, transitioning from a wide, open avenue into a claustrophobic urban canyon before emerging back into a broader city vista. It begins by trailing a bronze convertible along a multi-lane boulevard flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards. As the vehicle executes a sharp right turn at a large intersection, the scene shifts from the expansive avenue to a narrower street, passing a monument statue and moving beneath a dense canopy of digital advertisements. The camera then accelerates through this immersive corridor of light, experiencing a dramatic lens flare before decelerating to a complete stop behind a queue of vehicles in a sudden traffic jam. Finally, as the congestion clears, the car surges forward through a pedestrian crossing and under an overhead walkway, with the environment opening up to reveal the distant night sky and illuminated skyscrapers.
